## Model

**Provider:**
**Exact model identifier:**
**File affected:**

## What changed

- [ ] New model released
- [ ] Specification changed or newly disclosed
- [ ] Price changed
- [ ] Context window or maximum output changed
- [ ] Status changed: preview, generally available, deprecated, or retired
- [ ] Licence or terms changed
- [ ] Data retention or training-use terms changed
